title: ortgiesia legrelliana
intro: Ortgiesia legrelliana, also known as the Ortgiesia plant or Lesser Burdock, is a perennial plant in the family Arum. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Ortgiesia legrelliana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
